args: if [ -x "$PWD/.venv/bin/codeclone-mcp" ]; then exec "$PWD/.venv/bin/codeclone-mcp" --transport stdio; fi; if command -v poetry >/dev/null 2>&1; then poetry_env="$(poetry env info -p 2>/dev/null || true)"; if [ -n "$poetry_env" ] && [ -x "$poetry_env/bin/codeclone-mcp" ]; then exec "$poetry_env/bin/codeclone-mcp" --transport stdio; fi; fi; if command -v codeclone-mcp >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec codeclone-mcp --transport stdio; fi; echo 'codeclone-mcp not found: expected .venv/bin/codeclone-mcp, a Poetry env launcher, or a PATH entry' >&2; exit 1
